posts.text:
Dial it bck by telling Ocho give Joe the heads up he’s not going 2 make it?


Real-1 (@OnlyRealLeft)

Ocho was clearly in the wrong, but @ShannonSharpe  gotta dial it back sometimes when going in on him-this can unfortunately lead to an unintended collapse of a friendship.



— https://nitter.net/OnlyRealLeft/status/2034488762047369663#m

The issue is you lie


Abe McAlpin (@AbeMcalpin)

The issue is Shannon reacts to the same type of clips towards other people. Do you bro but don’t be a hypocrite will you are at it.



— https://nitter.net/AbeMcalpin/status/2034923372530802806#m

The Big 3 is LIVE NOW on @NightcapShow_ talkin’ March Madness & more!!! 🏀🔥

Watch Now + SUBSCRIBE:👇🏾👇🏾👇🏾
piped.video/live/rnvdYkBDmvM…

W/o best player had a 19pt lead. No excuse


Damien Gaddis (@pankalank)

Best player on the team been hurt for weeks. But, then not having better players is on him, no doubt.



— https://nitter.net/pankalank/status/2034808436341535218#m

Luka with a 60 piece and Bron with a Trip Dub on the 2nd of a bck2bck. Lakers have now beaten Knicks, Nuggets, Twolves, Rockets(2) Heat as part of 8gm win streak. Ppl will say those tms aren’t any good in an attempt 2 discredit the Lakers. #LakerNation #Luka4MVP
Congrats VCU not giving up and continuing 2 fight. That would’ve been easy 2 say this was over. #MarchMadness

H.Davis performed 1 of the worst coaching jobs. I’ve seen in a while. Hill Jr who has it going 2 play 1 on 1. Didn’t trap, blitz, 2 make him give the ball 🏀 up. Losing early in ACC tourney, losing big lead. Going 2 be hard convincing alumni/president. He should remain as coach
